name: ViewCamera
summary: The ViewCamera class defines a camera which can be used together with a visible view. Always supply a properly orthogonalized camera up vector when rotating the camera.

constructors.name: ViewCamera
constructors.summary: Instantiates a new view camera instance with zero length vectors.

methods.name: Modify
methods.summary: Updates the camera to the application view.

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Updates the camera parameters from the application view.

properties.name: DirectionVector
properties.summary: The camera direction (controls the camera pan and tilt).

properties.name: FieldOfView
properties.summary: The camera field of view as an angle (degrees) in the perspective view.

properties.name: Location
properties.summary: The camera location in global coordinates (XYZ).

properties.name: UpVector
properties.summary: The camera up vector (controls the camera roll).

properties.name: View
properties.summary: The view where the camera belongs to.

properties.name: ZoomFactor
properties.summary: The camera zoom factor (meter/pixel) in the orthogonal view.
